args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load data
cases_json = var_functions.query_db_6
casehistory_json = var_functions.query_db_8

# Parse the data
cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_json)
casehistory = pd.DataFrame(casehistory_json)

# Display first few rows to understand structure
print("Cases structure:")
print(cases.head())
print("\nCase history structure:")
print(casehistory.head())

# Clean ID fields by removing leading # if present
def clean_id(id_value):
    if isinstance(id_value, str) and id_value.startswith('#'):
        return id_value[1:]
    return id_value

cases['id'] = cases['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases['ownerid'] = cases['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
casehistory['caseid__c'] = casehistory['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)
casehistory['newvalue__c'] = casehistory['newvalue__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Get counts of owner assignments per case
owner_assignment_counts = casehistory['caseid__c'].value_counts()

# Cases with only one owner assignment (not transferred)
non_transferred_cases = owner_assignment_counts[owner_assignment_counts == 1].index.tolist()

# Filter cases to only include non-transferred cases within the date range
filtered_cases = cases[
    (cases['id'].isin(non_transferred_cases)) & 
    (cases['closeddate'] != 'None') &
    (cases['closeddate'].notna())
].copy()

print(f"\nTotal cases: {len(cases)}")
print(f"Non-transferred cases: {len(non_transferred_cases)}")
print(f"Closed non-transferred cases: {len(filtered_cases)}")

# Calculate handle time in hours
def calculate_handle_time(row):
    try:
        created = pd.to_datetime(row['createddate'])
        closed = pd.to_datetime(row['closeddate'])
        handle_time = (closed - created).total_seconds() / 3600  # in hours
        return handle_time
    except:
        return None

filtered_cases['handle_time_hours'] = filtered_cases.apply(calculate_handle_time, axis=1)

# Group by agent and calculate stats
agent_stats = filtered_cases.groupby('ownerid').agg({
    'id': 'count',
    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
}).round(2)

agent_stats.columns = ['case_count', 'avg_handle_time_hours']

# Filter agents with more than one case
agents_multiple_cases = agent_stats[agent_stats['case_count'] > 1].copy()

print(f"\nAgents with >1 case: {len(agents_multiple_cases)}")
print("\nTop agents by lowest average handle time:")
print(agents_multiple_cases.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours').head())

import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load data
cases_json = var_functions.query_db_6
casehistory_json = var_functions.query_db_8

# Parse the data
cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_json)
casehistory = pd.DataFrame(casehistory_json)

# Display first few rows to understand structure
print("Cases structure:")
print(cases.head())
print("\nCase history structure:")
print(casehistory.head())

# Clean ID fields by removing leading # if present
def clean_id(id_value):
    if isinstance(id_value, str) and id_value.startswith('#'):
        return id_value[1:]
    return id_value

cases['id'] = cases['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases['ownerid'] = cases['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
casehistory['caseid__c'] = casehistory['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)
casehistory['newvalue__c'] = casehistory['newvalue__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Get counts of owner assignments per case
owner_assignment_counts = casehistory['caseid__c'].value_counts()

# Cases with only one owner assignment (not transferred)
non_transferred_cases = owner_assignment_counts[owner_assignment_counts == 1].index.tolist()

# Filter cases to only include non-transferred cases within the date range
filtered_cases = cases[
    (cases['id'].isin(non_transferred_cases)) & 
    (cases['closeddate'] != 'None') &
    (cases['closeddate'].notna())
].copy()

print(f"\nTotal cases: {len(cases)}")
print(f"Non-transferred cases: {len(non_transferred_cases)}")
print(f"Closed non-transferred cases: {len(filtered_cases)}")

# Calculate handle time in hours
def calculate_handle_time(row):
    try:
        created = pd.to_datetime(row['createddate'])
        closed = pd.to_datetime(row['closeddate'])
        handle_time = (closed - created).total_seconds() / 3600  # in hours
        return handle_time
    except:
        return None

filtered_cases['handle_time_hours'] = filtered_cases.apply(calculate_handle_time, axis=1)

# Group by agent and calculate stats
agent_stats = filtered_cases.groupby('ownerid').agg({
    'id': 'count',
    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
}).round(2)

agent_stats.columns = ['case_count', 'avg_handle_time_hours']

# Filter agents with more than one case
agents_multiple_cases = agent_stats[agent_stats['case_count'] > 1].copy()

print(f"\nAgents with >1 case: {len(agents_multiple_cases)}")
print("\nTop agents by lowest average handle time:")
print(agents_multiple_cases.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours').head())

history_df = pd.DataFrame(history_json)

# Clean ID fields
def clean_id(id_val):
    if isinstance(id_val, str) and id_val.startswith('#'):
        return id_val[1:]
    return id_val

# Apply cleaning
cases_df['id'] = cases_df['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases_df['ownerid'] = cases_df['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
history_df['caseid__c'] = history_df['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)
history_df['newvalue__c'] = history_df['newvalue__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Count owner assignments per case
owner_assignment_counts = history_df['caseid__c'].value_counts()

# Cases with exactly one owner assignment (not transferred)
non_transferred_cases = owner_assignment_counts[owner_assignment_counts == 1].index.tolist()

# Filter closed, non-transferred cases in date range
filtered_cases = cases_df[
    (cases_df['id'].isin(non_transferred_cases)) & 
    (cases_df['closeddate'] != 'None') &
    (cases_df['closeddate'].notna())
].copy()

# Calculate handle time in hours
def calc_handle_time(row):
    try:
        created = pd.to_datetime(row['createddate'])
        closed = pd.to_datetime(row['closeddate'])
        hours = (closed - created).total_seconds() / 3600
        return round(hours, 2)
    except:
        return None

filtered_cases['handle_time_hours'] = filtered_cases.apply(calc_handle_time, axis=1)

# Group by agent
agent_stats = filtered_cases.groupby('ownerid').agg({
    'id': 'count',
    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
}).round(2)

agent_stats.columns = ['case_count', 'avg_handle_time_hours']

# Filter agents with > 1 case
agents_multiple_cases = agent_stats[agent_stats['case_count'] > 1].copy()

# Sort by average handle time ascending
sorted_agents = agents_multiple_cases.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours')

# Prepare results
results = {
    'total_cases_in_range': len(cases_df),
    'non_transferred_cases': len(non_transferred_cases),
    'closed_non_transferred_cases': len(filtered_cases),
    'agents_with_multiple_cases': len(agents_multiple_cases),
    'agent_rankings': sorted_agents.to_dict('index')
}

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(results))

import pandas as pd
import json

# Access data using the correct variable names from storage
cases_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:6']
history_result = locals()['var_functions.query_db:8']

# Convert to DataFrames
cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases_result)
history_df = pd.DataFrame(history_result)

# Clean ID fields
def clean_id(id_value):
    if isinstance(id_value, str) and id_value.startswith('#'):
        return id_value[1:]
    return id_value

# Apply ID cleaning
cases_df['id'] = cases_df['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases_df['ownerid'] = cases_df['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
history_df['caseid__c'] = history_df['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)
history_df['newvalue__c'] = history_df['newvalue__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Count owner assignments per case
owner_assignment_counts = history_df['caseid__c'].value_counts()

# Cases with exactly one owner assignment (not transferred)
non_transferred_cases = owner_assignment_counts[owner_assignment_counts == 1].index.tolist()

# Filter only closed, non-transferred cases
filtered_cases = cases_df[
    (cases_df['id'].isin(non_transferred_cases)) & 
    (cases_df['closeddate'].notna()) &
    (cases_df['closeddate'] != 'None') &
    (cases_df['closeddate'] != '')
].copy()

# Calculate handle time in hours
def calculate_handle_time(row):
    try:
        created = pd.to_datetime(row['createddate'])
        closed = pd.to_datetime(row['closeddate'])
        return round((closed - created).total_seconds() / 3600, 2)
    except:
        return None

filtered_cases['handle_time_hours'] = filtered_cases.apply(calculate_handle_time, axis=1)

# Group by agent
agent_stats = filtered_cases.groupby('ownerid').agg({
    'id': 'count',
    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
}).round(2)

agent_stats.columns = ['case_count', 'avg_handle_time_hours']

# Filter agents with more than one case
agents_multiple_cases = agent_stats[agent_stats['case_count'] > 1].copy()

# Sort by average handle time
sorted_agents = agents_multiple_cases.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours')

# Find the agent with lowest average handle time
if len(sorted_agents) > 0:
    lowest_agent_id = sorted_agents.index[0]
    lowest_avg_time = sorted_agents.iloc[0]['avg_handle_time_hours']
    result_message = f"Agent ID: {lowest_agent_id} (Avg Handle Time: {lowest_avg_time} hours)"
else:
    result_message = "No agents found with multiple cases"

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result_message)

import pandas as pd
import json

# Get the data from execute_python tool results 20 and 26
cases_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:20']
assignments_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:26']

# Create DataFrames
cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)
assignments_df = pd.DataFrame(assignments_data)

# Debug info
print(f"Total closed cases: {len(cases_df)}")
print(f"Total assignment counts: {len(assignments_df)}")

# Clean IDs - remove leading #
def clean_id(id_val):
    if isinstance(id_val, str) and id_val.startswith('#'):
        return id_val[1:]
    return id_val

cases_df['id'] = cases_df['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases_df['ownerid'] = cases_df['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
assignments_df['caseid__c'] = assignments_df['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Filter for non-transferred cases (assignment_count = 1)
non_transferred = assignments_df[assignments_df['assignment_count'] == 1]
print(f"Non-transferred cases: {len(non_transferred)}")

# Merge with cases
merged_df = cases_df.merge(non_transferred, left_on='id', right_on='caseid__c', how='inner')
print(f"Closed, non-transferred cases: {len(merged_df)}")

# Calculate handle time in hours
merged_df['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged_df['createddate'])
merged_df['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(merged_df['closeddate'])
merged_df['handle_time_hours'] = (merged_df['closeddate'] - merged_df['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Group by agent and calculate statistics
agent_stats = merged_df.groupby('ownerid').agg({
    'id': 'count',
    'handle_time_hours': 'mean'
}).round(2)

agent_stats.columns = ['case_count', 'avg_handle_time_hours']
print(f"\nAll agents:")
print(agent_stats)

# Filter agents with more than one case
agents_multiple = agent_stats[agent_stats['case_count'] > 1]
print(f"\nAgents with >1 case:")
print(agents_multiple)

# Find agent with lowest average handle time
if len(agents_multiple) > 0:
    lowest_agent = agents_multiple.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours').iloc[0]
    lowest_agent_id = agents_multiple.sort_values('avg_handle_time_hours').index[0]
    result = f"{lowest_agent_id}"
else:
    result = "No agents found with more than one case"

print(f"\n__RESULT__:")
print(result)

        return id_val[1:]
    return id_val

cases_df['id'] = cases_df['id'].apply(clean_id)

assignments_df['caseid__c'] = assignments_df['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)

args.code:
import pandas as pd

# Access the stored data
cases_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:20']
assignments_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:26']

# Create DataFrames
cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)
assignments_df = pd.DataFrame(assignments_data)

# Check data
print('Cases:', len(cases_df))
print('Assignments:', len(assignments_df))
print('Cases columns:', cases_df.columns.tolist())
print('Assignments columns:', assignments_df.columns.tolist())
print('\nFirst case:', cases_df.iloc[0] if len(cases_df) > 0 else 'None')
print('\nFirst assignment:', assignments_df.iloc[0] if len(assignments_df) > 0 else 'None')

# Clean IDs - remove leading #
for col in ['id', 'ownerid']:
    if col in cases_df.columns:
        cases_df[col] = cases_df[col].str.replace('^#', '', regex=True)

if 'caseid__c' in assignments_df.columns:
    assignments_df['caseid__c'] = assignments_df['caseid__c'].str.replace('^#', '', regex=True)

# Check assignment counts
print('\nAssignment counts distribution:')
print(assignments_df['assignment_count'].value_counts())

# Get non-transferred cases (count == 1)
non_transferred = assignments_df[assignments_df['assignment_count'] == 1]
print(f'\nNon-transferred cases: {len(non_transferred)}')

# Count cases per agent from closed cases
agent_case_counts = cases_df['ownerid'].value_counts()
print('\nCases per agent:')
print(agent_case_counts)

# Filter agents with > 1 case
agents_multi = agent_case_counts[agent_case_counts > 1]
print(f'\nAgents with >1 case: {len(agents_multi)}')
print(agents_multi)

import pandas as pd
import json

# Access all the required data
cases_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:50']
assignments_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:48']

# Create DataFrames
cases_df = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)
assignments_df = pd.DataFrame(assignments_data)

# Clean IDs - remove leading #
def clean_id(val):
    if isinstance(val, str) and val.startswith('#'):
        return val[1:]
    return val

# Clean case IDs and owner IDs
cases_df['id'] = cases_df['id'].apply(clean_id)
cases_df['ownerid'] = cases_df['ownerid'].apply(clean_id)
assignments_df['caseid__c'] = assignments_df['caseid__c'].apply(clean_id)

# Create set of non-transferred case IDs
non_transferred_case_ids = set(assignments_df['caseid__c'])

# Mark cases as transferred or not
cases_df['is_non_transferred'] = cases_df['id'].isin(non_transferred_case_ids)

# Clean closeddate - convert 'None' to actual None
cases_df['closeddate'] = cases_df['closeddate'].replace('None', None)

# For debugging
total_cases = len(cases_df)
total_closed = cases_df['closeddate'].notna().sum()
non_transferred = cases_df['is_non_transferred'].sum()
closed_non_transferred = cases_df[cases_df['is_non_transferred']]['closeddate'].notna().sum()

# Calculate total cases per agent (including transferred)
agent_total_cases = cases_df['ownerid'].value_counts()

# Calculate handle time ONLY for non-transferred, closed cases
non_transferred_cases = cases_df[cases_df['is_non_transferred'] & cases_df['closeddate'].notna()].copy()

if len(non_transferred_cases) > 0:
    # Calculate handle time in hours
    non_transferred_cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(non_transferred_cases['createddate'])
    non_transferred_cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(non_transferred_cases['closeddate'])
    non_transferred_cases['handle_hours'] = (non_transferred_cases['closeddate'] - non_transferred_cases['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600
    
    # Group by agent
    agent_handle_stats = non_transferred_cases.groupby('ownerid').agg({
        'id': 'count',
        'handle_hours': 'mean'
    }).round(2)
    
    agent_handle_stats.columns = ['closed_non_transferred_count', 'avg_handle_time']
    
    # Combine with total case counts
    agent_combined = agent_handle_stats.join(agent_total_cases.rename('total_case_count'))
    
    # Filter agents with > 1 total cases
    agents_multi = agent_combined[agent_combined['total_case_count'] > 1]
    
    if len(agents_multi) > 0:
        # Sort by average handle time
        lowest_agent = agents_multi.sort_values('avg_handle_time').iloc[0]
        lowest_agent_id = agents_multi.sort_values('avg_handle_time').index[0]
        result = lowest_agent_id
    else:
        result = None
else:
    result = None

# Return result
print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result))
